es.gob.jmulticard.jse.provider

Class DnieKeyStore

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.security.KeyStore
      • es.gob.jmulticard.jse.provider.DnieKeyStore

  • public class DnieKeyStore
extends java.security.KeyStore
    JCA Keystore for DNIe. It allows retrieving MRTD data type from DNIe.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.security.KeyStore

        java.security.KeyStore.Builder, java.security.KeyStore.CallbackHandlerProtection, java.security.KeyStore.Entry, java.security.KeyStore.LoadStoreParameter, java.security.KeyStore.PasswordProtection, java.security.KeyStore.PrivateKeyEntry, java.security.KeyStore.ProtectionParameter, java.security.KeyStore.SecretKeyEntry, java.security.KeyStore.TrustedCertificateEntry

      • verifyAge

        public boolean verifyAge(java.util.Date birthDate)
                  throws java.security.KeyStoreException
        Verify if the age date read from DNIe is later than the one passed.
        Parameters:
        birthDate - date to compare.
        Returns:
        'false' if age read is later, 'true' otherwise.
        Throws:
        java.security.KeyStoreException

      • verifyAge

        public boolean verifyAge(java.lang.String birthDate)
                  throws java.security.KeyStoreException
        Verify if the age date read from DNIe is later than the one passed.
        Parameters:
        birthDate - date to compare in string format 'dd/MM/yyyy'.
        Returns:
        'false' if age read is later, 'true' otherwise.
        Throws:
        java.security.KeyStoreException
